feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Now that the heat wave is over, can we finally admit that AC is not just a symbo…
entry.content: Now that the heat wave is over, can we finally admit that AC is not just a symbol of the arrogant American mindset, but a basic appliance for any developed residence? They can still keep their car dependence, infant circumcision, and gun culture.

entry.title: /int/ International: Fascism is a direct descendant of Christianity: In Christianity, those who suffe…
entry.content: Fascism is a direct descendant of Christianity: In Christianity, those who suffer should be grateful for their suffering instead of rebelling, because suffering would lead the faithful (i.e., the suckers) to Heaven to sit beside the greatest sufferer in human history. In fascism, however, suffering is good, and those who suffer should be grateful for it, because suffering would make us stronger and tougher, more macho, more alpha, more stoic. And those who are hard on themselves would earn the r

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >The temptation to use artificial intelligence (AI) to cheat is shaking up elite…
entry.content: >The temptation to use artificial intelligence (AI) to cheat is shaking up elite universities in the United States. Professor Roberto Serrano, who is the Harrison S. Kravis University Professor of Economics at Brown University, has detected a massive fraud in one of the classes he teaches, ECON 1170, an advanced undergraduate course in mathematical economics. He has conclusive evidence that at least 50 students cheated on the March midterm exam, making it the biggest known scandal at Brown and i

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I unironically think they are a gateway band for trannies. I went to high school…
entry.content: I unironically think they are a gateway band for trannies. I went to high school with 3 "guys" whose favorite band was The Doors and two of them trooned out while the remaining one turned out to be gay. I think it's because they are mainstream enough to be classed with the "greats" like Led Zeppelin and Pink Floyd and thus available in any boomer's vinyl or CD collection while also being esoteric and strange enough to make them explore further and eventually wind up as trannies

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: CLAYFACE test screening leaks
entry.content: >Generally positive reception. >110 minutes runtime. >R-rated with a lot of gore and some nudity. >Funnier than the trailer makes it out to be. >Completely standalone with no references to Batman or the greater DCU. >Comparisons with Joker, The Substance, Vanilla Sky and The Incredible Hulk. >No full body transformation, Matt/Clayface only shapes his limbs into weapons when in a rage for “out-of-control attacks”. >One scene features Matt’s face melting while he’s in a plane going through turbule

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Exceptionally 5/10
entry.content: The most mid movie I have ever seen. Acting, set design, etc was all pretty good. The lack of story other than "black guy marriage issues" kills it. I even know about all Kane's background Youtube lore blah blah blah and I was still waiting the whole time for something truly interesting to happen. Is there some shit I'm missing or was this just reddit slop that I wasted time for? I am actively hoping that I am just retarded and missed out on some incredible secret shit that only true film connoi

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: London Walking video
entry.content: We're having some really hot weather in the UK at the moment, so naturally large amounts of people are still standing in queues in the blazing sunshine. entry.content: Cumming from the ass is just like cumming from jerking off. With all the hassle, I don't think I'm doing it again. The internet always say "oh it feels so good" "oh it feels so different from cumming from penile stimulation" "oh my whole body quivers and I think I got a whole new obsession" No bro, you just cum. That's it. Why would I think it would be any different, cum is cum. When you cum your pelvic floor contracts, and you feel good when you cum, because of the chemicals released or smt. WH
